name: Fullgoal Tianfeng Strengthen Inc Bd(LOF)
summary: Fullgoal Tianfeng Strengthen Inc Bd(LOF) is a bond fund that seeks to provide stable income and capital appreciation by investing primarily in fixed-income securities. The fund aims to enhance returns through active management and credit analysis. It is managed by Fullgoal Fund Management Co., Ltd. and is available as a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF).
